Name: Mulesoft - Deploy to Cloudhub
Description: Deploys a Mulesoft API to Cloudhub

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Anypoint.Organization.Id
Parameters.Label: Anypoint OrganizationID
Parameters.HelpText: The Organization ID of your Anypoint account.

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Anypoint.Client.Id
Parameters.Label: Anypoint Client ID
Parameters.HelpText: Client ID of the Anypoint user used for deployment.

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Anypoint.Client.Secret
Parameters.Label: Anypoint Client Secret
Parameters.HelpText: Client Secret of the Anypoint user used for deployment.

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Asset.File
Parameters.Label: Mulesoft Asset File
Parameters.HelpText: Select the package containing the Mulesoft API to upload to Exchange.

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Anypoint.Runtime.Version
Parameters.Label: Runtime version
Parameters.HelpText: The version of the runtime to use for your application.

Parameters.Name: Mulesfot.Anypoint.Worker.Count
Parameters.Label: Number of Workers
Parameters.HelpText:
(Optional) 	
Number of workers. (This value is '1' by default)

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Anypoint.Worker.Size
Parameters.Label: Worker Size
Parameters.HelpText: (Optional) Size of the workers in vCores. (This value is '1' by default)

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Anypoint.Region
Parameters.Label: Region
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the region to deploy to.

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Anypoint.CLI.AdditionalArguments
Parameters.Label: Additional CLI arguments
Parameters.HelpText: A comma delimited list of additional arguments to add to the CLI.

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Node.CLI.Version
Parameters.Label: NodeJS version
Parameters.HelpText: Use to specify which version of the NodeJS CLI to use when choosing the Download Node option

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Anypoint.CLI.Version
Parameters.Label: Anypoint CLI Version
Parameters.HelpText: Specify the version of the CLI being used.

Parameters.Name: Mulesoft.Download
Parameters.Label: Download NodeJS and Anypoint CLI?
Parameters.HelpText: Tick the box to dynamically download the NodeJS and Anypoint CLI utilities to deploy.
